title: Filipino Pinakbet with Haricot Beans
description: A traditional Filipino vegetable dish made with a mixture of sautéed vegetables and seasonings. This recipe combines the classic pinakbet flavors with the addition of haricot beans.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the onion and tomato and sauté until the vegetables are softened.
Add the pinakbet mixture and haricot beans and stir well.
Add the intensely flavored fish sauce (patis), salt, black pepper, and chili peppers.
Stir well and cook for 5 minutes.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve hot as a snack or side dish.
Optional: Serve with steamed rice or as a topping for grilled meats.
